summary: Completed testing of 5 AJUSTES from Prompt_Completo_ELO_Marco2026.md. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed all UI adjustments working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1, should set minWidth/minHeight - cosmetic only

backend_tests: test_migrar_ajustes_marco2026_endpoint - PASS - Returns stats with pendentes_verificados, elegiveis, atualizados etc
test_create_chamado_auto_fill_motivo - PASS - New chamados get motivo_pendencia from status_pedido mapping
test_update_motivo_clears_verificar - PASS - When motivo_pendencia changes, verificar_adneia is set to False

AJUSTE_3.description: Multi-select Parceiro/Canal filter with comma-separated values
backend_tests: test_single_parceiro_filter - PASS - GET /api/chamados?parceiro=CSU returns only CSU chamados
test_multi_parceiro_filter - PASS - GET /api/chamados?parceiro=CSU,LTM returns chamados from both
frontend_tests: Multi-select popover shows checkboxes for all partners (Bradesco, CSU, Camicado, Coopera, Global Rewards, LL Loyalty, LTM, Livelo, etc.)
Selecting CSU and LTM shows '2 canais selecionados' in filter button

AJUSTE_4.description: Total na Base card independent of filters
backend_tests: test_total_na_base_endpoint - PASS - GET /api/admin/total-na-base returns total_chamados=1355, total_pedidos
test_total_na_base_independent_of_filters - PASS - Total returns same value regardless of chamados filter
frontend_tests: Card visible in stats row with amber/yellow styling
Shows '1355 Total na Base' which matches /api/admin/total-na-base response

AJUSTE_5.description: Date display in Status Pedido column from data_ultimo_status field
backend_tests: test_chamados_list_has_data_ultimo_status - PASS - GET /api/chamados returns data_ultimo_status for chamados with pedido_erp
test_chamado_detail_has_pedido_data_status - PASS - Single chamado endpoint returns pedido with data_status
frontend_tests: Status Pedido column shows date (e.g., '19/02/2026') in gray text below status text

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 AJUSTES implemented correctly and working as expected
motivo_pendencia_mapping.py contains proper STATUS_PEDIDO_TO_MOTIVO mapping table
MOTIVOS_AUTO_ATUALIZAVEIS correctly limits auto-update to Ag. Compras, Ag. Logística, Enviado
STATUS_NAO_ALTERAR correctly excludes Entrega cancelada, CANCELADO from auto-updates
Multi-select parceiro filter uses $in query for multiple values
Total na Base endpoint is simple count of all chamados, independent of any filters
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ajustes_marco2026.py - Created test file for all 5 AJUSTES
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 AJUSTES from Marco2026 are fully implemented and tested. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_ajustes_marco2026.py covers all backend functionality. Frontend UI shows: (1) Total na Base card with amber styling in stats row, (2) Multi-select Parceiro filter with checkboxes, (3) Status Pedido column with date below status text. The mapping table in motivo_pendencia_mapping.py is working correctly for auto-filling motivo_pendencia.
